---
name: Question & Support
about: Ask a question, request clarification, or discuss the project
title: '[QUESTION]: '
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

**What is your question?**
A clear and concise description of what you are trying to understand or figure out.

**Describe the context or what you are trying to achieve**
A clear and concise description of the bigger picture or your ultimate goal. What led you to ask this question?

**What have you tried or researched so far?**
A brief description of what you have already looked into (e.g., checked the documentation, tried a specific code workaround, or analyzed local logs).

**Additional context**
Add any other context, relevant code snippets, or screenshots that might help clarify your question here.
